note: Machine-readable cleaning thresholds consumed by build_cleaned_map_building_blocks.py. Scores come from score_map_building_blocks.py and are in [0,1] (higher = cleaner). A block is KEPT only if it clears its type's bar AND carries no disqualifying flag. Cropped/too-small structural blocks are sent to re-cut (larger context) before any review; misclassified or contaminated blocks are quarantined. Nothing here promotes a block to generator_ready.

mine_floor_base.intent: Pure Back-layer floor; no Buildings wall, no Front wall overlay, no void/ladder/object.

mine_floor_variation.intent: Floor with subtle repeated detail; reject wall/corner/decor contamination.

mine_blocked_boundary.intent: Clean void/deep-rock boundary. Reject blocks with floor fragments, plants, or stray objects unless geometry proves a true boundary.

mine_wall_body.intent: Coherent wall body with full vertical Back/Buildings/Front context. Reject pure black-void slabs and cropped mid-wall fragments.

mine_wall_forward_lower_face.intent: Complete lower wall face as a structural unit: wall band plus floor/shadow context below. Reject single ribbon fragments.

mine_wall_back_top_edge.intent: Back/top wall edge with floor below the cap. Reject cropped void caps.

mine_wall_left_edge.intent: True left side-wall transition (full wall column beside floor). Reject lights, torches, isolated objects, cropped void chunks.

mine_wall_right_edge.intent: True right side-wall transition (full wall column beside floor). Reject lights, torches, isolated objects, cropped void chunks.

mine_inner_corner.intent: Complete inner-corner relationship: both wall directions plus floor/void context. Prefer 5x5/7x7 over 3x3.

mine_outer_corner.intent: Complete outer-corner relationship: both wall directions plus floor diagonal. Prefer 5x5/7x7 over 3x3.

mine_round_corner.intent: Rounded corner; requires diagonal context and complete neighbour mask. Reject if diagonal role cannot be proven.

mine_angled_wall.intent: Diagonal/angled wall; requires diagonal context and complete neighbour mask. Reject if diagonal role cannot be proven.
